name: langton-arena-pvp-monorepo
description: Langton Arena PvP — monorepo (frontend + backend). Stage 8+ uses pnpm workspaces.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter langton-arena-web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @langton/mvp-server exec tsc --noEmit

comments.scope: Stage 8 Day 2 — добавлен mvp-server. Existing 5 services (api-gateway/ws-gateway/etc) пока без node_modules.
